backstory.original: An unnamed child was born to Damaran refugees fleeing the fall of Bloodstone City at the hands of the Warlock Knights of Vaasa, and orphaned when their parents succumbed to a lingering curse. Taken in by wandering elven monks of Sune, the child grew up in the Waterdhavian Monastery of the Sun, surrounded by compassion, discipline, and the pure light of unconditional love. They excelled in body, mind, and spirit, finding peace in exercise, meditation, and crafts, yet always yearned for more - to someday go beyond the monastery walls. Upon coming of age, Kyre chose their own name and at last set out on a pilgrimage across Faerûn to bring light to the dark places where it's needed most.
backstory.display: 血石城在瓦萨邪术师骑士的铁蹄下沦陷，在从中逃难的达马拉难民中诞生了一个没有名字的孩子。由于父母死于一场延续不止的诅咒，这个孩子成为了孤儿。后来，这个孩子被伺奉淑娜的游方精灵武僧收留，在深水城的太阳修道院里，在怜悯、管教以及无条件之爱的纯洁光辉笼罩下慢慢长大。这个孩子在身、心、灵方面皆表现出色，并在锻炼、冥想以及制作手工艺品中寻得了内心的平静，然而其心中始终怀有更深的渴望——有朝一日走出修道院的高墙。成年之时，凯尔为自己取了名字，并终于踏上了穿越费伦的朝圣之旅，将光明带去最需要它的黑暗之地。

description.original: Kyre attacks the toughest enemy for 1 hit.
description.display: 凯尔攻击最强硬的敌人，造成 1 次命中。

longDescription.original: Kyre attacks the enemy with the most remaining health with a searing bolt of magical radiance, dealing 1 hit.
longDescription.display: 凯尔用一道灼热的魔法光辉箭矢攻击剩余生命值最多的敌人，造成 1 次命中。

description.original: Kyre creates an energy wave, dealing 1 ultimate hit to affected enemies.
description.display: 凯尔制造一道能量波，对被波及的敌人造成 1 次杀招命中。

longDescription.original: Kyre creates a wave of radiant light and fire, dealing 1 ultimate hit to enemies it envelops.
longDescription.display: 凯尔制造一道由耀眼的光辉与火焰交织而成的能量波，对被波及的敌人造成 1 次杀招命中。

description.desc: Kyre increases the damage of all Champions adjacent to them by $amount%.
凯尔会使所有与其相邻勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Kyre increases the damage of adjacent Champions.
tipText.display: 凯尔会提高相邻勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Kyre's normal attacks have a $base_chance% chance to stun their $(if feat_assigned 2237)targets$(else)target$(fi) for $duration seconds. This chance is multiplicatively reduced by 25% each time they stun an enemy with this ability, but resets back to full when changing areas.
凯尔的普通攻击有 $base_chance% 的几率使其$(if feat_assigned 2237)目标$(else)目标$(fi)眩晕 $duration 秒。每当凯尔用此技能眩晕一名敌人，此几率会降低 25%，以乘算方式堆叠，但切换区域后会重置为初始值。

Each time any Champion in the formation attacks a stunned enemy, Kyre gains a Radiance stack. Kyre increases the effect of Radiant Soul by $amount% for each Radiance stack, stacking multiplicatively up to $(max_stacks___2) stacks and resetting when changing areas.
每当阵型中的任意勇士攻击一名被眩晕的敌人，凯尔获得一层“光辉”堆叠层数。每有一层“光辉”堆叠层数，凯尔会使“光耀之魂”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $(max_stacks___2) 层，并且在区域切换时重置。

tipText.original: Kyre has a chance to stun enemies, and their buff increases each time any Champion attacks a stunned enemy.
tipText.display: 凯尔有一定几率眩晕敌人，并且每当任意勇士攻击一名被眩晕的敌人，凯尔的增益会进一步提升。

description.desc: Champions that attack a stunned enemy have a $amount% additively increased chance to critically hit that enemy and deal $amount___2% more critical damage.
攻击一名被眩晕敌人的勇士有 $amount% 的几率（以加算方式堆叠）对该敌人造成暴击，并额外造成 $amount___2% 的暴击伤害。
Increases the effect of Radiant Soul by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with the Control role, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位拥有控制角色定位的勇士，“光耀之魂”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Kyre is ever calm in the face of danger, trusting in their techniques and those of their allies.
specializationDescription.display: 凯尔面对危险时总是很冷静，十分信赖自己的武艺和盟友。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Radiant Soul by $amount% for each Champion with a Dexterity of 16 or higher in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位敏捷大于等于 16 的勇士，“光耀之魂”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Kyre fights best with agile allies who can keep pace with their relentless training regiment.
specializationDescription.display: 凯尔与能跟上其极高强度训练节奏的敏捷盟友并肩作战时表现最佳。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Radiant Soul by $amount% for each Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. In addition, Champions adjacent to Kyre gain the Good tag. This does not affect their other alignment tags, and doesn't affect whether they are eligible for the adventure.
阵型中每有一位善良勇士，“光耀之魂”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。另外，与凯尔相邻的勇士获得善良标签。这不会影响他们的其他阵营标签，也不会影响他们是否有资格参加冒险。

specializationDescription.original: Kyre's spirit burns with righteous might, inspiring their allies to greater heroics.
specializationDescription.display: 凯尔的精神燃烧着正义的力量，激励着其盟友做出更伟大的英勇之举。

description.original: I've got a lot of love to give.
description.display: 我有很多的爱可以给予他人。

description.original: I wish you could see yourself as I see you. There is beauty in you.
description.display: 我希望你能像我看待你一样看待你自己。你身上有着一种美。

description.original: The light of life and love shall never fall to darkness. This, I vow.
description.display: 生命与爱的光芒绝不会被黑暗吞噬，我就此发誓。

description.original: It starts with learning to believe in yourself.
description.display: 首先要学会相信自己。

description.original: Believe in others as you would have them believe in you.
description.display: 就像你希望别人相信你一样，你也要相信别人。

description.original: Be as a beacon in this world, projecting hope for all to see.
description.display: 做这个世界的灯塔，投射希望，让所有人看见。

description.original: I've practiced this spiral thrust maneuver ten thousand times.
description.display: 这个螺旋突刺的动作我已经练过一万遍了。

effects.description: Increases the base chance of Stunning Strike up to 200%.

description.original: Know yourself. Know what needs to be done. Know to never hesitate.
description.display: 了解你自己。清楚需要做的事。明白永远不要犹豫。

effects.description: Increases the stun duration to 20 seconds for Stunning Strike.

description.original: Be yourself, fiercely and without fear! Embrace the power within you!
description.display: 坚定无畏地做你自己！拥抱你内在的力量！

description.original: May our blows strike true.
description.display: 愿我们每击必中。

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: May this light cleanse the evil before us.
description.display: 愿此光芒净化我们前方的邪恶。

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: My order knows the body inside and out. I'll show you where to strike.
description.display: 我所属的法师团对人体了如指掌。我来教你们该往哪里下手。

effects.description: Increases the critical hit chance of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: May this light cleanse the evil before us.
description.display: 愿此光芒净化我们前方的邪恶。

effects.description: Increases the critical hit chance of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: Indomitable light dwells within all. Train with me. Become your greatest self.
description.display: 不屈的光芒存在于每个人的心中。和我一起修行，成为最好的自己吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: No more holding back!
description.display: 不再克制了！

effects.description: Kyre fires two bolts with their base attack.

description.original: It feels good to put on muscle again! Feel the burn!
description.display: 再次增肌的感觉真棒！感受这肌肉的灼烧感吧！

description.original: It's what my parents gave the monks who took me in. It was all they had.
description.display: 这是我父母交给收留我的僧侣的东西。那是他们仅有的东西。

description.original: I've restored it as best I could. It's not worth much, but it's precious to me.
description.display: 我尽了最大的努力来修复它。它虽然不值什么钱，但对我来说非常珍贵。

description.original: Where I'm from the wilderness is dark, cold, and full of terror.
description.display: 我长大的那片荒野黑暗、寒冷，充满恐怖。

description.original: My parents sacrificed everything for me. I will make the best of this life.
description.display: 我的父母为了我牺牲了一切。我一定要过好我这一生。

description.original: The inscription is my name. It means 'flawless' in elvish. No, I'm not vain!
description.display: 这上面的铭文是我的名字。它在精灵语中的意思是“完美无瑕”。不，我才不是自负呢！

description.original: I wear it to remind myself that nothing is perfect, and that's okay.
description.display: 我戴着它来提醒自己，没有什么是完美的，不完美也没关系。

description.original: This world has plenty of flaws, and so what? It's still worth fighting for.
description.display: 这个世界有很多缺陷，那又怎么样？它依然值得我们为之战斗。

description.original: Real beauty comes from within, and shows your true face to the world.
description.display: 真正的美源自内在，并向世界展现你的真面目。

description.original: They're not magical, but they look nice, right?
description.display: 它们并没有魔力，但是很好看，对吧？

description.original: Lady Firehair teaches us to love ourselves, each other, and all things.
description.display: 火发夫人教诲我们要爱自己，爱他人，爱世间万物。

description.original: For special occasions, like a wedding. That's always a day worth waiting for.
description.display: 适合在一些特殊的场合佩戴，比如婚礼。那永远是个值得等待的日子。

description.original: My ultimate accessory for self-expression, however I feel each day!
description.display: 这是我自我表达的终极配饰，无论我每天的感觉如何！

description.original: These were so bad that I started to make my own clothing.
description.display: 这拖鞋实在烂到不行了，我不得不开始自己做衣服了。

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: I craft these myself! Do you want a pair? Good soles for good souls, ha!
description.display: 这是我自己做的！你要不要也来一双？正所谓，好马配好鞍嘛！

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: Needlework is tedious, but good for focusing the mind to stay sharp.
description.display: 针线活很乏味，但那有助于集中注意力，保持警惕。

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: It's stunning, I know. Here, I'll prove it! Hold still.
description.display: 它非常漂亮，我知道。来，我证明给你看！别动。

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

description.original: I collect keys. Still not sure what this one goes to...
description.display: 我喜欢收集钥匙。我到现在都还不确定这是开哪把锁的……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: This one? I earned myself a room at the Keep on the Borderlands.
description.display: 这把？我为自己在边境要塞争取到了一个房间。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: A memento from my time in Akharin Sangar. I learned much there.
description.display: 这是我在阿卡林桑加尔那段时光的一件纪念品。我在那里学到了很多东西。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I saw horrors in Phandalin, but light always prevails over darkness.
description.display: 我在范达林目睹过许多恐怖的事物，但光明总会战胜黑暗。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: They're all my original designs. I'm still working out what to call this piece.
description.display: 这些全都是我的原创设计。我还在构思给这个取什么名字。

description.original: I call it 'set adrift amidst stormclouds.' That's all I remember of that time.
description.display: 我给它取名叫“在暴风雨云中漂流”。那是我对那段时光的全部记忆。

description.original: This is 'fiery passion for the world.' True devotion is a flame bound in silk.
description.display: 这个叫“对世界的炽热之情”。真正的奉献是被丝绸束缚着的火焰。

description.original: The 'warm light of the sun slays darkness.' That's my calling. Will you join me?
description.display: 这个叫“太阳的暖光斩灭黑暗”。那是我的使命。你愿意和我一道吗？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Magic Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: An unnamed child was born to Damaran refugees fleeing the fall of Bloodstone City at the hands of the Warlock Knights of Vaasa, and orphaned when their parents succumbed to a lingering curse. Taken in by wandering elven monks of Sune, the child grew up in the Waterdhavian Monastery of the Sun, surrounded by compassion, discipline, and the pure light of unconditional love. They excelled in body, mind, and spirit, finding peace in exercise, meditation, and crafts, yet always yearned for more - to someday go beyond the monastery walls. Upon coming of age, Kyre chose their own name and at last set out on a pilgrimage across Faerûn to bring light to the dark places where it's needed most.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Kyre is a Support and Control Champion whose Radiant Soul ability increases the damage of adjacent Champions. This Sun Soul Monk can stun enemies, gains power as those enemies are attacked, and helps allies score devastating critical hits.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 血石城在瓦萨邪术师骑士的铁蹄下沦陷，在从中逃难的达马拉难民中诞生了一个没有名字的孩子。由于父母死于一场延续不止的诅咒，这个孩子成为了孤儿。后来，这个孩子被伺奉淑娜的游方精灵武僧收留，在深水城的太阳修道院里，在怜悯、管教以及无条件之爱的纯洁光辉笼罩下慢慢长大。这个孩子在身、心、灵方面皆表现出色，并在锻炼、冥想以及制作手工艺品中寻得了内心的平静，然而其心中始终怀有更深的渴望——有朝一日走出修道院的高墙。成年之时，凯尔为自己取了名字，并终于踏上了穿越费伦的朝圣之旅，将光明带去最需要它的黑暗之地。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 凯尔是一位支援与控制勇士，其“光耀之魂”技能会提高相邻勇士的伤害。这位太阳之魂武僧可以眩晕敌人，在这些被眩晕的敌人受攻击时获得力量，并帮助盟友打出极具杀伤力的暴击。

display.name: 双阳神功
display.description: 不再克制了！

effects.description: 凯尔的基本攻击会发射两道魔法箭矢。

original.name: Heavy Lifter
original.description: It feels good to put on muscle again! Feel the burn!

display.name: 中流砥柱
display.description: 再次增肌的感觉真棒！感受这肌肉的灼烧感吧！

original.name: Cracked Gem
original.description: It's what my parents gave the monks who took me in. It was all they had.

display.name: 破裂的宝石
display.description: 这是我父母交给收留我的僧侣的东西。那是他们仅有的东西。

original.name: Bloodstone
original.description: I've restored it as best I could. It's not worth much, but it's precious to me.

display.name: 血石
display.description: 我尽了最大的努力来修复它。它虽然不值什么钱，但对我来说非常珍贵。

original.name: Bundle of Wolfsbane
original.description: Where I'm from the wilderness is dark, cold, and full of terror.

display.name: 一捆狼毒花
display.description: 我长大的那片荒野黑暗、寒冷，充满恐怖。

original.name: Ironfell Memento
original.description: My parents sacrificed everything for me. I will make the best of this life.

display.name: 陨铁纪念物
display.description: 我的父母为了我牺牲了一切。我一定要过好我这一生。

original.name: Etched Bangle
original.description: The inscription is my name. It means 'flawless' in elvish. No, I'm not vain!

display.name: 蚀刻手镯
display.description: 这上面的铭文是我的名字。它在精灵语中的意思是“完美无瑕”。不，我才不是自负呢！

original.name: Polished Bangle
original.description: I wear it to remind myself that nothing is perfect, and that's okay.

display.name: 打磨过的手镯
display.description: 我戴着它来提醒自己，没有什么是完美的，不完美也没关系。

original.name: Elegant Hairpin
original.description: This world has plenty of flaws, and so what? It's still worth fighting for.

display.name: 优雅的发簪
display.description: 这个世界有很多缺陷，那又怎么样？它依然值得我们为之战斗。

original.name: Exquisite Hand Chain
original.description: Real beauty comes from within, and shows your true face to the world.

display.name: 精美手链
display.description: 真正的美源自内在，并向世界展现你的真面目。

original.name: Prayer Beads
original.description: They're not magical, but they look nice, right?

display.name: 念珠
display.description: 它们并没有魔力，但是很好看，对吧？

original.name: Sunite Beads
original.description: Lady Firehair teaches us to love ourselves, each other, and all things.

display.name: 淑娜信徒念珠
display.description: 火发夫人教诲我们要爱自己，爱他人，爱世间万物。

original.name: Ruby Rose Broach
original.description: For special occasions, like a wedding. That's always a day worth waiting for.

display.name: 红宝石玫瑰胸针
display.description: 适合在一些特殊的场合佩戴，比如婚礼。那永远是个值得等待的日子。

original.name: Arborean Shawl
original.description: My ultimate accessory for self-expression, however I feel each day!

display.name: 奔放的披肩
display.description: 这是我自我表达的终极配饰，无论我每天的感觉如何！

original.name: Worn-Out Sandals
original.description: These were so bad that I started to make my own clothing.

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

display.name: 磨损的拖鞋
display.description: 这拖鞋实在烂到不行了，我不得不开始自己做衣服了。

effects.description: 使“完美打击”的伤害提高 $amount%

original.name: Fitted Sandals
original.description: I craft these myself! Do you want a pair? Good soles for good souls, ha!

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

display.name: 定制的拖鞋
display.description: 这是我自己做的！你要不要也来一双？正所谓，好马配好鞍嘛！

effects.description: 使“完美打击”的伤害提高 $amount%

original.name: Silk Sash Belt
original.description: Needlework is tedious, but good for focusing the mind to stay sharp.

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

display.name: 丝质宽腰带
display.description: 针线活很乏味，但那有助于集中注意力，保持警惕。

effects.description: 使“完美打击”的伤害提高 $amount%

original.name: Sunblest Surcoat
original.description: It's stunning, I know. Here, I'll prove it! Hold still.

effects.description: Increases the critical damage bonus of Kyre's Flawless Strike by $amount%

display.name: 受太阳赐福的外袍
display.description: 它非常漂亮，我知道。来，我证明给你看！别动。

effects.description: 使“完美打击”的伤害提高 $amount%

original.name: Mystery Key
original.description: I collect keys. Still not sure what this one goes to...

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 神秘钥匙
display.description: 我喜欢收集钥匙。我到现在都还不确定这是开哪把锁的……

effects.description: 使凯尔的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Castellan's Key
original.description: This one? I earned myself a room at the Keep on the Borderlands.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 城堡总管的钥匙
display.description: 这把？我为自己在边境要塞争取到了一个房间。

effects.description: 使凯尔的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Golden Feather
original.description: A memento from my time in Akharin Sangar. I learned much there.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 黄金羽毛
display.description: 这是我在阿卡林桑加尔那段时光的一件纪念品。我在那里学到了很多东西。

effects.description: 使凯尔的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Shattered Obelisk
original.description: I saw horrors in Phandalin, but light always prevails over darkness.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Kyre's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 破碎的方尖碑
display.description: 我在范达林目睹过许多恐怖的事物，但光明总会战胜黑暗。

effects.description: 使凯尔的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Unfinished Tattoo
original.description: They're all my original designs. I'm still working out what to call this piece.

display.name: 未完成的纹身
display.description: 这些全都是我的原创设计。我还在构思给这个取什么名字。

original.name: Damaran Tattoo
original.description: I call it 'set adrift amidst stormclouds.' That's all I remember of that time.

display.name: 达马拉纹身
display.description: 我给它取名叫“在暴风雨云中漂流”。那是我对那段时光的全部记忆。

original.name: Sunite Tattoo
original.description: This is 'fiery passion for the world.' True devotion is a flame bound in silk.

display.name: 淑娜信徒纹身
display.description: 这个叫“对世界的炽热之情”。真正的奉献是被丝绸束缚着的火焰。

original.name: Sun Soul Tattoo
original.description: The 'warm light of the sun slays darkness.' That's my calling. Will you join me?

display.name: 太阳之魂纹身
display.description: 这个叫“太阳的暖光斩灭黑暗”。那是我的使命。你愿意和我一道吗？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位人类勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位敏捷大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a WIS score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位感知大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a GOOD alignment
阵型中每有一位善良阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Magic Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位魔法勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
